name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

name: Standing Medium Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); forces stand on hit; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 1f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

name: Standing Light Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; special cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

name: Standing Medium Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 1st hit has 4f less hitstun (cannot combo into 214HK); when chained into, 4f shorter hitconfirm window (2f if 2nd hit only); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Becomes fully cancelable during FSE, even when not chained into; not airborne despite the animation; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 5th recovery frame; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

name: Crouching Medium Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 1f extra recovery on whiff and extends a wider hurtbox until the end of recovery; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Chained version of 2HP during SA2 (FSE); jump cancelable on hit only; when jump canceled, FSE air normals cause juggle state; 2f shorter CHAIN react window when chained into

name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 2f shorter special hitconfirm window when chained into; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Crouching Medium Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 1f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; Range: 1.517 (1st frame: 1.446); DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery

name: Slash Kick
notes: Chained version of 2HP during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 4f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

name: Jumping Light Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); lower body projectile invuln 12-23f

name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Jumping Medium Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 6-20f except around attack hitbox

name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: During FSE forward jump, can cancel into divekick; lower body projectile invuln 10-13f and kicking leg 10-19f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 10-13f and kicking leg 10-19f

name: Neutral Jump Heavy Kick
notes: Hits on both sides (can cross-up if opponent tries to move underneath Juri); can be used as an air-to-air; when chained after FSE nj.MP, puts airborne opponents into juggle state; lower body projectile invuln 10-13f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

name: Neutral Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 10-13f

name: Kyosesho
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

name: Senkai Kick
notes: Chained Feng Shui Engine version; not airborne despite the animation; the special/chain cancel window only applies when chaining into 6MK and the KD doesn't allow anything to juggle on hit; 2 extra recovery frames on whiff; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

name: Renko Kicks
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 3f extra recovery on whiff; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 4f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; canceling the 1st hit uses less juggle potential, allowing alternate juggle routes in exchange for some initial damage; extended whiff hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery

name: Korenzan
notes: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); both hits knock down; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents; 8f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

name: Saihasho
notes: 1-hit projectile; costs 1 Fuha stock; can press MK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock (within the first 3 active frames)

name: Ankensatsu
notes: Costs 1 Fuha stock; 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state (useful for SA3 cancel); can press LK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely)

name: Go Ohsatsu (1 Stock)
notes: Costs 1 Fuha stock; both hits are Super cancelable; can press LK or MK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only airborne hit launches high enough for follow-up juggle besides SA3 cancel); good for damage when comboing into SA3

name: Shiren-sen
notes: Comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better KD Advantage; no follow-up after juggle state; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height

name: OD Shiren-sen
notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better juggle follow-ups and better KD Adv.; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height

name: Sakkai Fuhazan (hold)
notes: Projectile hitbox; requires one Fuha stock to use (consumes this stock); active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,1000

name: Feng Shui Engine (hold)
notes: Holding the button performs a dash attack; puts airborne opponents into free juggle state or maintains existing juggle state; can cancel on hit/block into any normal; afterwards, has same properties as regular Feng Shui Engine activation; dash attack cannot hit cross-up

name: Neutral Taunt
notes: "You gonna keep me waiting, babe?"

name: Forward Taunt
notes: "Killer beam! Or whatever."

name: Back Taunt
notes: "What are you waiting for?"
